content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic rewards from autonomous ICM-enabled agents can be repurposed to actively curate long-term memory for state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agents, creating a self-sustaining memory improvement loop where the agent prioritizes storing unexpected, information-dense experiences instead of just storing task-recent or task-labeled data. This removes the bottleneck of manual memory pruning and fixed memory sampling that currently limits scaling of long-horizon active learning agents.
